title: Extract peer EUI64/IID from sockaddr in msg_inbox_post handler
description: Add code to derive peer_eui64 from IPv6 link-local address in msg_inbox_post similar to deaddrop_post and confessions_post. Use for oscore_ctx_get_by_eui64.
close_reason: Added peer_eui64 extraction from sockaddr_in6 + lichen_eui64_to_iid + oscore_ctx_get_by_eui64 lookup in msg_inbox_post (coap_server.c:310-325). Integrated with local_admin check to support both LCI SLIP and OSCORE mesh peers. Added include for ipv6_addr.h. Verified via build attempts and pattern match to deaddrop/confessions. Commit bfeb2d9ca.
